purpose: Fourth AS-owned schematic-linked Universal Cell trace, covering the stem command-buffer accumulation subset that appends a matching one-hot input as bit 1.

ports.label: north
ports.summary: First signal channel on the triangular stem buffer node.

ports.label: east
ports.summary: Second signal channel on the triangular stem buffer node.

ports.label: west
ports.summary: Third signal channel on the triangular stem buffer node.

layers.summary: A matching one-hot standard input appends bit 1 to the stem command buffer.
layers.boundary: This layer states symbolic stem buffer accumulation only; it does not execute the full command buffer.

layers.summary: The stem buffer node uses the same triangular GELC/RLEM port vocabulary as the other traces.
layers.boundary: This layer fixes schematic geometry and port orientation, not a complete command-routing circuit.

layers.summary: The trace records every current AS Cell field before and after one buffer append.
layers.boundary: This layer is limited to the ADR-0022 accumulation subset and adds no command decoding.

layers.summary: Switchable circulator hardware and auxiliary command-routing support remain candidate interpretations.
layers.boundary: This layer keeps physical implementation and RALA-like auxiliary circuitry separate from the tested buffer append.
